reference_videos.target_vibe: 에너지 (SNS Viral 릴스/쇼츠 스타일, 빠른 템포 훅)
reference_videos.sns_marketing_hook: Explosive sizzle sound and extreme close-up of oil bubbling.
reference_videos.camera_angle: Extreme Close-Up, Dutch angle, Whip pan
reference_videos.lens_optical_effects: Macro lens, shallow depth of field
reference_videos.food_focus_rule: Focus strictly on the texture of the crisping meat and boiling oil. NO HANDS.
reference_videos.negative_constraints: blurry, text overlay, humans, hands, faces
reference_videos.image_visual_context: Thick cuts of raw pork belly on a black iron grill, red meat with white fat.
reference_videos.reference_style_blueprint: [REFERENCE CLIP ANALYSIS] The video starts with a violent macro crash-zoom onto the grill. Lighting is contrast-heavy with neon undertones. The pacing is frantic, using a whip pan to transition between raw and cooked states, emphasizing intense kinetic energy and heat.
reference_videos.rationale: To mimic the viral K-BBQ reference, I am applying a violent crash-zoom and whip pans to the user's meat image. I am matching the neon-heavy, high-contrast lighting from the blueprint while ignoring human elements to prevent Veo distortion.
reference_videos.audio_script: 와.. 고기 익는 소리 들리세요? 당장 달려가고 싶죠!

reference_videos.target_vibe: 프리미엄 (CF 광고 스타일, 고급 시네마틱 렌즈 워크)
reference_videos.sns_marketing_hook: Slow and graceful reveal of the dessert with soft rim lighting.
reference_videos.camera_angle: Low angle, tracking shot, slow pan
reference_videos.lens_optical_effects: 85mm telephoto, cinematic bokeh, soft focus bloom
reference_videos.visual_keywords: Luxurious, Cinematic Lighting, Slow Motion, Elegant
reference_videos.food_focus_rule: Focus entirely on the glossy texture and elegant shape of the dessert. NO HUMANS.
reference_videos.negative_constraints: messy, chaotic, fast movement, humans, hands
reference_videos.image_visual_context: A sleek, glossy chocolate mousse cake on a pristine white ceramic plate with gold flakes.
reference_videos.reference_style_blueprint: [REFERENCE CLIP ANALYSIS] The video uses ultra-smooth, slow-motion robotic camera arms. It starts slightly out of focus and slowly pulls back into sharp focus (rack focus). Lighting is soft, warm, and highly directional, creating a premium commercial feel without any sudden movements.
reference_videos.rationale: I am adopting the slow-motion rack focus and warm directional lighting from the luxury reference blueprint. The pacing will be significantly slowed down to give a premium CF feel, focusing on the gloss of the chocolate.
reference_videos.audio_script: 입안에서 사르르 녹는 완벽한 달콤함. 오늘 하루, 나를 위한 선물 어떠세요?

reference_videos.target_vibe: 에너지 (SNS Viral 릴스/쇼츠 스타일, 빠른 템포 훅)
reference_videos.sns_marketing_hook: Extreme close-up of creamy white sauce being squeezed onto a dark, textured rice ball, creating a visually satisfying and intriguing moment.
reference_videos.camera_angle: Extreme Close-up, High angle, Medium close-up, Static overhead shots
reference_videos.lens_optical_effects: Macro, Shallow depth of field, Bright natural lighting
reference_videos.food_focus_rule: Focus heavily on texture and lighting. NO HUMANS.
reference_videos.negative_constraints: blurry, text overlay, humans, hands, faces
reference_videos.reference_style_blueprint: The camera pacing is extremely fast, characterized by rapid cuts between different stages of food preparation and consumption, maintaining high energy. Lighting is consistently bright and even, emphasizing the vibrant colors and textures of the dishes without harsh shadows or dramatic effects. Camera movement is minimal, primarily consisting of static overhead or close-up shots, with the dynamism generated by the quick edits and the action within the frame, such as pouring, mixing, and dipping.
reference_videos.rationale: Mimicking the uploaded reference video precisely.

reference_videos.lens_optical_effects: Cinematic bokeh, Warm color grading, Natural light, Soft focus
reference_videos.food_focus_rule: Focus heavily on texture and lighting. NO HUMANS.

reference_videos.reference_style_blueprint: The camera pacing is deliberate and unhurried, allowing each cafe's ambiance to settle with the viewer through sustained shots. Lighting is consistently warm and soft, leveraging natural window light and ambient indoor fixtures to cultivate a deeply cozy and inviting atmosphere. Camera movement is minimal, primarily consisting of static shots or gentle, slow pans, with one distinct low-angle tracking shot down a staircase, emphasizing the tranquil beauty of each space.
reference_videos.rationale: Mimicking the uploaded reference video precisely.

reference_videos.lens_optical_effects: Standard wide-angle, Medium telephoto, Cinematic bokeh, Natural light

reference_videos.food_focus_rule: Focus heavily on texture and lighting. NO HUMANS.

reference_videos.reference_style_blueprint: The camera pacing is rapid, featuring quick cuts between various restaurant interiors and their Han River views, maintaining a dynamic and engaging rhythm. Lighting is predominantly dim and romantic inside, often contrasted with the vibrant city lights outside, creating a cozy yet sophisticated atmosphere. Camera movement is a blend of stable wide shots, gentle pans across the dining areas, and occasional subtle tracking, all designed to smoothly showcase the diverse settings and their scenic backdrops.
reference_videos.rationale: Mimicking the uploaded reference video precisely.
